{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Lindon's second cannon
| introduced = cradle-06-underlord
}}

== Underlord ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Lindon's second cannon]] uses plates of goldsteel to restrain excess power from the bindings and [[scripts]] to focus them.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c19">''Underlord'', chapter 19</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
